prompt: Implement `fizzbuzz(n: number): string` returning 'Fizz' if divisible by 3, 'Buzz' if by 5, 'FizzBuzz' if both, else the number as a string.
canonicalSolution: export function fizzbuzz(n: number): string { const s = (n%3===0?'Fizz':'')+(n%5===0?'Buzz':''); return s || String(n); }
test: assert(fizzbuzz(3)==='Fizz'); assert(fizzbuzz(5)==='Buzz'); assert(fizzbuzz(15)==='FizzBuzz'); assert(fizzbuzz(7)==='7'); assert(fizzbuzz(1)==='1'); assert(fizzbuzz(30)==='FizzBuzz'); assert(fizzbuzz(9)==='Fizz'); assert(fizzbuzz(10)==='Buzz');
